steps.name: Feature spec, API spec, step file generation
steps.result: spec.md + step-2~5.md 작성 완료. Option C(LOCAL 즉시/KIS T+2) 채택.

steps.name: Implementation (TDD)
steps.result: BusinessDayCalculator, SettlementCommandService, SettlementScheduler 신규 구현. ExecutionProcessor Option C 분기 수정. 12/12 단위 테스트 통과.

steps.name: Testing and QA verification
steps.result: 12/12 통과. spec.md 모든 동작 검증 완료.

steps.name: Code review
steps.result: 1차: 🔴 Finding 1(REQUIRES_NEW 누락) + 🔴 Finding 2(accountRepository.save 누락) → 2b rework. 2차: PASS — 두 🔴 모두 수정 확인. 🟡 2건(processSettlement @Transactional 불필요, test assertion gap) 있으나 merge 비블로킹.

steps.name: Rework — batch transaction isolation fix
steps.result: SettlementProcessor 신규 빈 생성(REQUIRES_NEW). SettlementCommandService 배치 @Transactional 제거. accountRepository.save 추가. 모든 테스트 통과.

steps.name: Summary, commit, PR
steps.result: summary.md 작성, 커밋, PR #5 생성 완료.
